rationale: This skill wraps the Cloudflare Wrangler CLI, so the agent will invoke `wrangler` (often via `npx`) plus `npm install` to ensure v4.x+ is present. Wrangler reads/writes `wrangler.jsonc`, generates type files (`worker-configuration.d.ts`), maintains local state under `.wrangler/state`, and reads `.dev.vars` and `node_modules/wrangler/config-schema.json`. Network traffic targets Cloudflare's API/dashboard/docs hosts plus npm for installs; the SKILL.md also explicitly documents the `sparrow.cloudflare.com` telemetry beacon and per-invocation writes to `~/.config/.wrangler/metrics.json`, log files, and `/tmp/update-check/wrangler-latest.json`.
